title: serratula bracteifolia
intro: Serratula bracteifolia, also known as the "narrow-leaved milkwort," is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Serratula bracteifolia has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Serratula bracteifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Serratula bracteifolia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
